eurosceptic.t: n. 欧洲统一怀疑论者；反对英国亲近欧盟的人

eurosceptics.t: (eurosceptic 的复数) n. 欧洲统一怀疑论者；反对英国亲近欧盟的人

euroskepticism.t: n. 反对欧盟整合及英国加入欧元的主张和论调

euroskeptics.t: n. 英国反对欧盟整合及英国加入欧元的人士（大多是年纪较大的白人男性）

eurospeak.t: 欧洲共同市场官员使用的官方语言

eurostar.t: 欧洲之星（一条连接英国伦敦圣潘可拉斯车站与法国巴黎北站、里尔以及比利时布鲁塞尔南站的高速铁路服务）

eurotiales.d: n. order of fungi having a closed ascocarp (cleistothecium) with the asci scattered rather than gathered in a hymenium

eurotium.d: n a genus of fungi belonging to the order Eurotiales

eurotium repens.t: [医] 熟物曲霉菌(面包或熟果表面)

eurotunnel.t: n. 欧洲隧道（世界上最长的海底隧道）；欧洲隧道公司

eurus.t: [希腊神话]欧洛斯(东风神或东南风神); 东风；东南风

euryale.t: n. [希腊神话]欧律阿勒(三个蛇发女妖之一)
euryale.d:
n. A genus of water lilies, growing in India and China. The
   only species (E. ferox) is very prickly on the peduncles and calyx. The
   rootstocks and seeds are used as food.
n. A genus of ophiurans with much-branched arms.

eurybath.t: n. (能在不同深度水底生存的)广深性水生生物

eurydice.t: n. 欧律狄刻（希腊神话中的一个形象）
eurydice.d: n. (Greek mythology) the wife of Orpheus

euryhaline.t: a. 能在不同盐分之环境中存活的, 广盐性的

euryhygric.t: a. [生]广湿性的(指能够经受各种不同湿度的)

euryphagous.t: a. [动]广食性的(指能吃各种食物生存)

euryphotic.t: [医] 泛光域的, 宽光域的(明暗视力范围广阔的)

eurypterid.d: n large extinct scorpion-like arthropod considered related to horseshoe crabs

eurypterida.d: n. extinct aquatic arthropods of the Paleozoic

eurypterids.t: (eurypterid 的复数) n.[古生]广翅鲎
eurypterids.d:
plural of eurypterid
n large extinct scorpion-like arthropod considered related to horseshoe crabs

eurypteroid.d: a. Like, or pertaining to, the genus Euryperus.

eurypylous.t: 有大孔的(指动物), 宽口的

eurystheus.t: n. [希腊神话]欧律斯透斯(迈锡尼国王，斯忒涅罗斯和尼喀珀之子，珀耳修斯之孙，赫刺克勒斯曾为他服役)

eurystomatous.t: a. [动]阔嘴的,有可扩展的嘴的

eurythermic.t: [医] 泛温生长的, 阔温域的

eurythmia.t: 建筑各部分比例的完美

eurythmic.t: a. 音乐舞蹈体操的, (建筑物)比例协调的

eurythmics.d: n the interpretation in harmonious bodily movements of the rhythm of musical compositions; used to teach musical understanding

eurythmy.t: n. （建筑物）比例协调； 有节拍的动作
eurythmy.d:
n. Just or harmonious proportion or movement, as in the
   composition of a poem, an edifice, a painting, or a statue.
n. Regularly of the pulse.

eurytrophy.t: 广幅营养植物, 广幅营养性

eus.t: [医][=external urethral sphincter]外尿道括约肌，尿道外括约肌

euschongastia audyi var. paishaensis.t: [医] 乌氏真棒恙螨白沙变种

euschongastia schlugeri var. fukienensis.t: [医] 休劳格氏真棒恙螨福建变种

euscope.t: 映象显微镜, 显微镜映象器

eusebio.t: n. (Eusebio)人名；(西)欧塞维奥；(意)欧塞比奥

eusebius.t: [男子名] 尤西比厄斯来源于希腊语，含义是“虔诚的”(pious)

eusebius of caesarea.t: [网络] 该撒利亚的优西比乌；优西比乌斯；优西比渥

eusocial.t: a. (昆虫)完全社会性的,完全群居的

eusporangiate.d: a (of ferns) having sporangia that arise from a group of epidermal cells

eusporangium.d: n a sporangium that arises from a group of epidermal cells

eustace smith's accentuated.t: [医] 史密斯氏杂音(支气管狭窄时的一种听诊体征)

eustace smith's sign.t: [医] 尤·史密斯氏征, 史密斯氏征(支气管腺增大时的一种听诊体征)

eustachian.d:
a. Discovered by Eustachius.
a. Pertaining to the Eustachian tube; as, Eustachian
   catheter.

eustachian tonsil.t: [医] 咽鼓管淋巴小结, 格拉赫氏扁桃体

eustachio.d: n. Italian anatomist who was one of the fathers of modern anatomy; noted for descriptions of the ear and the heart (1520-1574)

eustacia.t: [女子名] 尤斯塔西娅 Eustace的阴性

eustacy.t: n. 海面升降, 海面变化

eustasy.t: 海面进退; 海面升降; 冰河变异

eustatic.t: a. 海面升降的, 海面变化的

eustatically.t: adv. 海面升降地, 海面变化地

eustatism.t: 海面升降性, 海面进退性

eustele.t: n. [植]真中柱( 存在于大多数裸子植物和被子植物的茎内)

eustigmin.t: 优斯的明(迷走神经紧张药)

eustis.t: [人名] 尤斯蒂斯; [地名] [美国] 尤斯蒂斯

eustis' test.t: [医] 优斯提斯氏试验(检心机能)

eustis's tests.t: [医] 尤斯提斯氏试验(检心机能)

eustoma.t: [网络] 洋桔梗；洋桔梗属；黄洋桔梗

eustoma grandiflorum.t: [网络] 洋桔梗；草原龙胆；大花草原龙胆

eustomachous.t: 胃健全的, 消化(力)正常的

eustress.t: [医]良性应激反应，易应激，优良应激，舒适的应激

eut.t: [医][=eosinophilic ulcer of the tongue]舌嗜酸性细胞性溃疡

eutaxy.d: n. Good or established order or arrangement.

eutectic.t:
a. 容易溶解的, 低共熔的
n. 低共熔混合物
eutectic.d: n. a mixture of substances having a minimum melting point

eutectic ice.t: [医] 共融冰, 盐冰(约含盐23.3%)

eutectic mixture.t:
[化] 低共熔物; 低共熔混合物
[医] 共溶混合物

eutectiferous.t: a. [化]产生低共熔混合物的, 低共熔混合物类型的

eutectoid.t:
n. [化]类低共熔体
a. 类低共熔体的, 共析的

eutectometer.t: 凝点记录仪, 快速相变测定仪

eutely.t: 生物体中细胞数量恒定的

euterpe.t: n. 欧忒耳珀(主管音乐及抒情诗的女神)
euterpe.d:
n. a monocotyledonous genus of graceful palm trees in tropical America
n. (Greek mythology) the Muse of music (or the flute)

euterpe oleracea.t: [网络] 蔬食埃塔棕；巴西莓；亚马逊巴西莓果油

euterpean.t: a. 【希腊神话】欧忒耳珀的；和音乐有关的；音乐的
euterpean.d: a. Of or pertaining to Euterpe or to music.

euthanasia.t:
n. 安乐死
[医] 安死术
euthanasia.d: n. the act of killing someone painlessly (especially someone suffering from an incurable illness)

euthanatize.t: vt.使安乐死,对…施无痛致死术

euthanise.t: vt. [主英国英语] = euthanize [亦作 euthanatise]

euthanize.t: vt.使安乐死,对…施无痛致死术

euthenics.t:
n. 环境优生学, 环境改善学
[医] 优境学
euthenics.d: n. the study of methods of improving human well-being and efficient functioning by improving environmental conditions

euthenist.t: n. 环境优生学家；环境改善学家 (euthenics的变形)

eutheria.d: n all mammals except monotremes and marsupials

eutherian.t: a. & n.[动]真哺乳亚纲的(动物)
eutherian.d:
n mammals having a placenta; all mammals except monotremes and marsupials
a of or relating to or belonging to the subclass Eutheria

eutherians.t: (eutherian 的复数) adj.& n.[动]真哺乳亚纲的(动物)
eutherians.d:
plural of eutherian
n mammals having a placenta; all mammals except monotremes and marsupials
a of or relating to or belonging to the subclass Eutheria

euthermophilous.t: 真适温的, 真喜温的

euthyneura.d:
n. pl. A large division of gastropod molluske, including
   the Pulmonifera and Opisthobranchiata.

eutocous.t: [医] 顺产的, 正常分娩的

eutomous.t: a. [矿]有明显解理的,容易解裂的, 裂隙清楚的

eutopic.t: 位置正常的, 正位的

eutrombicula alfreddugesi.t: [医] 阿[耳弗雷杜热斯]氏真恙螨

eutrophic.d: a. (ecology) of a lake or other body of water rich in nutrients and subject to eutrophication

eutrophic water.t: [化] 过营养水; 过肥水

eutrophicate.t: v. 使超营养, 藻类污染

eutrophication.d: n. excessive nutrients in a lake or other body of water, usually caused by runoff of nutrients (animal waste, fertilizers, sewage) from the land, which causes a dense growth of plant life; the decomposition of the plants depletes the supply of oxygen, leading to the death of animal life

eutrophy.t: n. 营养正常, 由于矿物质的增加而适合动植物生长
eutrophy.d:
n. Healthy nutrition; soundless as regards the nutritive
   functions.

eutychian.d:
n. A follower of Eutyches [5th century], who held that the
   divine and the human in the person of Christ were blended together as
   to constitute but one nature; a monophysite; -- opposed to Nestorian.

eutychianism.t: n. 欧迪奇主义（欧迪奇倡导的基督教神学基督论学说）
eutychianism.d: n. The doctrine of Eutyches and his followers.

euv.t: [医][=extreme ultraviolet laser]远紫外线激光器

euxanthon.t: 优吨酮, 1, 7-二羟(基)夹氧杂蒽酮

euxanthone.t: [化] 优┷吨酮; 1,7-二羟(基)-9-氧杂蒽酮(请比较flavone黄酮)

euxenite.d:
n. A brownish black mineral with a metallic luster, found in
   Norway. It contains niobium, titanium, yttrium, and uranium, with some
   other metals.
